subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath guided us unto His straight path... The rain of mercy hath descended in these days in such wise that verily man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدانا الی صراطه المستقیم ... امطار رحمت بشأنی در این ایام باریده که فی‌الحقیقه انسان
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @hypocrisy
